prompt: Create a cinematic dark fantasy steampunk alley scene in a gritty undercity at night, in the style of high-end animated game concept art. A punk young woman with bright magenta-pink short spiky hair stands in the foreground from a dramatic low angle, aiming an oversized brass-and-black revolver directly toward the viewer so the gun barrel dominates the upper left foreground with strong foreshortening. Her face is deliberately obscured by a flat opaque square censor block in muted reddish-brown, centered over the face. She wears a sleeveless off-white shirt, dark cropped vest, fingerless bandage wraps around both hands and forearms, belts and holsters at the waist, dark purple striped trousers, and visible arm tattoos; her posture is tense, aggressive, and confrontational. The background is a dense industrial undercity street with towering arched architecture, pipes, catwalks, hanging lamps, smoke, warm window lights, teal-blue atmospheric glow, and neon signs. Include exactly three readable/sign-like elements: one torn poster on a barrel at far left reading “WANTED” with smaller rough text “PILTOVER ENFORCERS” and “VI”, one pink circular neon sign on the right reading THE LAST DROP, and one small blue circular neon face icon with X eyes and an O mouth. Use moody blue-green and amber lighting, volumetric haze, painterly detail, dynamic perspective, sharp focus on the weapon and character, wide cinematic 16:9 composition, no extra characters, no watermark.
